Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission Recruitment 2026 has released an official notification for UPSSSC Teacher Cadre 2026 Qualification. 
The last date to apply is **27/04/2026**.
Candidates must have Click Here as minimum educational qualification.

## How to Apply

1. UPSSSC Teacher Cadre Recruitment 2026. Candidate Can Apply Form within Last Date.
2. Candidate Read the Full Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form.
3. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
4. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc.
5. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
6. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
